name: Goblin Keychain
info: Goblin Keychain: This keychain features a bright, cartoon-style goblin emote character from clash royal with smooth, rounded shapes and bold outlines. The goblin has green skin, big yellow-tinted eyes, and a sad, pouty expression that gives it a cute, expressive personality. Its hands are raised in a droopy gesture, adding to the overall playful look. Printed with clean colors and simple shading, this design makes for a fun, eye-catching keychain accessory that stands out on backpacks, bags, or keyrings.
